name: terminal
description: Execute controlled terminal operations. Supports foreground, background (NOTIFY_HANDLER on completion), and PTY mode for interactive tools. Dangerous commands require handler approval.

timeout_sec.description: Execution timeout in seconds (1–600, default from config). In background mode only applies to how long the background process is allowed to run.

cwd_mode.description: Sandbox base directory. playground=agent_playground/, tmp=agent_playground/tmp/, repo=agent_playground/repo/

cwd.description: Sub-path appended under cwd_mode root (e.g. 'src/utils'). Path escape via ../ is blocked.

background.description: Run detached. Returns immediately with status=background. Handler receives NOTIFY_HANDLER with notify_type=TOOL_RESULT when the process exits.

pty.description: Allocate a pseudo-terminal (PTY). Required for interactive CLI tools (Python REPL, ncurses, etc.). Uses forkpty on Linux/macOS, ConPTY on Windows.

force.description: Skip dangerous-command approval check. Only set after explicit user confirmation.
